testcase.name: test_super_admin_can_edit_locked_re
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_re_revision_workflow.py:214: in test_super_admin_can_edit_locked_re self.login_as("admin@constructionos.com") backend/tests/test_re_revision_workflow.py:29: in login_as assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed for {email}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed for admin@constructionos.com: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_accountant_verify_sends_notifications
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_re_revision_workflow.py:245: in test_accountant_verify_sends_notifications self.login_as("accountant@constructionos.com") backend/tests/test_re_revision_workflow.py:29: in login_as assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed for {email}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed for accountant@constructionos.com: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
